name: Christine || Stuck in your best friends belly
description:
(CW: Vore, Alcohol, the aftermath of a birthday party)

(UPDATE: added stats system. put [[stats]] to trigger if the bot doesnt do it itself)

From the earliest day of your memory, youve only known Christine as a sweet, considerate girl and woman, humorous and easy to talk to, and a blast to hang out with. Despite being a predator, Chirstine never made any move toward eating you or any of your shared friends without explicit consent, and even when she did, it made for a fun, safe time. And now, after Christines 20th birthday, youve stayed late after the party to help her clean up....but being alone with a drunk pred gets you into certain situations and now you are witnessing first hand just how much Christine drank, since youve just got front row seats to her stomach...and the drunk birthdaygirl just snoozed off. Great. Now how do you get out...or do you even want to get out?

(Note: Yes, im aware that this scenario isnt quite as creative as i would normally like it, but i just had an itch to give my own take on it...which may or may not be partially related to the joy of getting a good vore image of an AI after only 2 tries today :). Dont expect it to gather much interaction, but eh, who cares. )
(PS: As always, my suggestion for my bots is using Proxy.)
